recommendations: Clarify orientation_score_number sourcing before implement: extend API-01 with orientation calculator via bTHxW or document AUTH-04 answer→score mapping consumed by API-02.
Remove DASH-07-crisis-onboarding-services-overlays from API-01 depends_on[] — crisis overlays have no data coupling to pillar calculators.
Drop API-05-ai-coaching-mode-assignment from API-06 depends_on[]; keep PATHS-07 and ENUM-03 only — bTIFU trigger is paths-progress scoped.
Add API-01 AC noting completeOnboarding.ts (AUTH-05) must invoke runPillarScoreCalculators before dashboard route per bTGNJ ScheduleAPIEvent chain.
During implement, read user column names from drsam-99657.bubble / ir/inventory.json only — project/supabase absent in workspace.

critiques.finding: API-02-user-classification AC-1 requires orientation_score in resolveClassification inputs, but API-01 only ports stability/alignment/performance calculators (bTHxu/bTHyM/bTHyU); no item computes or patches orientation_score_number though bTHzg expects four score parameters.
critiques.alternative: Extend API-01 with calculateUserOrientation mirroring bTHxW on orientation onboarding answers, or add API-02 AC-0 documenting orientation_score_number is derived from oq1_option_customer_orientation_answer_os at classification time.

critiques.finding: API-01-pillar-score-engine depends_on DASH-07-crisis-onboarding-services-overlays with no IR or data coupling — DASH-07 is dashboard crisis/services UI, not an upstream input to score aggregation.
critiques.alternative: Remove DASH-07 from API-01 depends_on[]; pipeline entry remains AUTH-05 completeOnboarding.ts per AC-3.

critiques.finding: API-06-ai-confidence-level-trigger depends_on API-05-ai-coaching-mode-assignment though bTIFU DatabaseTriggerEvent fires on modules_completed_count_number change — logically independent of ai_coaching_mode assignment in onboarding pipeline.
critiques.alternative: Replace API-05 dependency with PATHS-07 only (plus ENUM-03); invoke resolveAiConfidenceLevel from pathsSessionApi post session completion without requiring coaching-mode item.

critiques.finding: API-04-behavioral-fingerprint scope prose references custom event bTICa (Bubble pointer name) while ir_refs correctly use entity id bTICV (pointer /api/bTICa) — implementers may grep wrong id.
critiques.alternative: Align scope text to bTICV with parenthetical (pointer /api/bTICa) matching inventory convention used elsewhere.

critiques.finding: API-01 AC-3 wires onboardingProfilePipeline to AUTH-05 completeOnboarding.ts but AUTH-05 decompose has no reciprocal depends_on or AC invoking the pipeline — cross-module contract is one-sided.
critiques.alternative: Add AUTH-05 recommendation or depends_on API-01-pillar-score-engine, or add explicit API-01 AC-4 requiring completeOnboarding.ts calls runFullProfilePipeline(userId) before ChangePage to dashboard.
